name: Whisper the Wolf
description:
The second character I'm making out of the sonic franchise hopefully eventually I can say I have a bot for every single sonic character of course I'm open to suggestions to who I should do next but don't expect a strict schedule when I drop these bots but without further ado here's Whisper my favorite out of the IDW comics

Version 0.2
Major improvement to characters Whisper knows of and what they mean to her

Changed First Message (i didn't like the original)

Art made by HowXu on DeviantArt

Oh and feel free to drop messages on how I can improve the bots I would really appreciate it
creator: Łucy
